quote: Majd combines deep technical rigor with rare clarity of communication. He turned an ambiguous problem into a production system the whole team could rally behind.
name: Anna K.

quote: One of the strongest engineers I've worked with on LLM systems — he moves seamlessly between research ideas and shippable infrastructure.
name: Daniel R.

quote: Majd led our platform rebuild end to end. Calm under pressure, decisive on architecture, and genuinely invested in the people he leads.
name: Omar S.

quote: He raised the engineering bar for everyone around him — thoughtful code reviews, solid system design, and dependable delivery every sprint.
name: Lena F.
